nasb.text: In the visions of God He brought me into the land of Israel and set me on a very high mountain, and on it to the south there was a structure like a city.

esv.text: In visions of God he brought me to the land of Israel, and set me down on a very high mountain, on which was a structure like a city to the south.

cnv.text: 在　神的異象中，他帶我到以色列地，把我安置在一座很高的山上；在山上的南面，有好像是一座城的建築物。

ccb.text: 在异象中上帝把我带到以色列的一座高山上，山的南面仿佛有一座城。
